name: samt-api-qa
description: API testing and OpenAPI automation for SAMT

scripts.test:regression: httpyac tests/bootstrap.http tests/fixtures.http tests/wait-auth-cooldown.http tests/api-auth.http tests/api-users.http tests/api-groups.http tests/api-semesters.http tests/api-project-configs.http tests/api-permissions.http --all
scripts.tests:regression: httpyac tests/bootstrap.http tests/fixtures.http tests/wait-auth-cooldown.http tests/api-auth.http tests/api-users.http tests/api-groups.http tests/api-semesters.http tests/api-project-configs.http tests/api-permissions.http --all
scripts.tests:regression:ci: httpyac tests/wait-auth-cooldown.http tests/api-auth.http tests/api-users.http tests/api-groups.http tests/api-semesters.http tests/api-project-configs.http tests/api-permissions.http --all
scripts.tests:all: httpyac tests/bootstrap.http tests/fixtures.http tests/api-smoke.http tests/wait-auth-cooldown.http tests/api-auth.http tests/api-users.http tests/api-groups.http tests/api-semesters.http tests/api-project-configs.http tests/api-permissions.http --all && npm run tests:contract
